title: Feature Root: GitHub CI test/build/publish automation
description: Shared execution root for delivering the GitHub Actions workflow, release automation, validation, documentation, and signoff for spec `spec-dd4b17af`. This container is non-runnable and exists only to coordinate the child beads for the feature.
acceptance_criteria: A single GitHub Actions workflow under `.github/workflows/ci.yml` runs on pushes to `main`.
The workflow runs tests before any build or publish steps.
Successful builds bump the patch version in `pyproject.toml`, commit the bump with `[skip ci]`, build artifacts, and publish a tagged GitHub release.
Developer-facing documentation explains the automated patch bump flow and the manual major/minor bump process.
Validation and review confirm the workflow structure matches the spec and requires no secrets beyond the built-in `GITHUB_TOKEN`.
